SESSION_EXPIRED: Session expired, please log in again
TOKEN_EXPIRED_OR_INVALID: Authorization token is invalid or expired
USER_NOT_FOUND_OR_WRONG_PASSWORD: User not found or incorrect password provided
DEVICE_ID_MISSING_OR_NOT_NUMBER: Parameter deviceId is missing or is not a number
DEVICE_NOT_BELONGS_TO_USER: The requested device does not belong to user with ID {userId}
INVALID_DATE_VALUE: Value "{value}" is not a valid date
INVALID_QUERY_PARAMETER: Invalid parameter specified in the request
DEVICE_STATE_NOT_EXISTS: State of device with ID {deviceId does not exist
